tools.name: browser_session_create
tools.description: Create a persistent browser session. Returns a sessionId in the response text. Use this sessionId in all subsequent browser_session_* calls (goto, content, click, fill, evaluate, scroll, metadata, close). Example: call this first, then use browser_session_goto with the returned sessionId.

visible.description: Launch a visible browser window for manual interaction (e.g., entering credentials). The window will stay open until the session is closed.

tools.name: browser_session_goto
tools.description: Navigate to a URL. Requires sessionId from browser_session_create. Returns confirmation with the URL navigated to. Has built-in retry with exponential backoff for flaky loads.

waitFor.description: CSS selector to wait for after navigation

tools.name: browser_session_content
tools.description: Get page content. mode 'text' extracts readable text, 'screenshot' returns base64 image, 'html' returns raw HTML, 'markdown' returns markdown-formatted content. Requires sessionId from browser_session_create.

tools.name: browser_session_click
tools.description: Click an element by CSS selector. Returns page content after the click (use mode to get screenshot or text). Requires sessionId from browser_session_create. Has built-in retry for flaky elements.

tools.name: browser_session_fill
tools.description: Fill form fields and optionally submit. Each field has a CSS selector and value. If submit selector is provided, clicks it after filling. Returns page content. Requires sessionId from browser_session_create. Has built-in retry for flaky forms.

tools.name: browser_session_evaluate
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in the page context. Script must return a value (string, number, or JSON-serializable object). Requires sessionId from browser_session_create.

tools.name: browser_session_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page. direction 'down' or 'up', amount in pixels (default 500). Requires sessionId from browser_session_create.

tools.name: browser_session_type
tools.description: Type text into a focused element or simulate keystrokes. Sends key events character-by-character, which triggers input validators and dynamic form handlers better than direct value setting. Use for CAPTCHAs, autocomplete, or sites that validate on key events.

selector.description: CSS selector to focus before typing (optional - if omitted, types into currently focused element)

delay.description: Delay between keystrokes in ms (default 0, use 50-100 for slow sites)

keystrokes.description: Special key presses: Enter, Tab, Escape, ArrowUp, ArrowDown, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Backspace, Delete, Home, End, PageUp, PageDown

tools.name: browser_session_inspect
tools.description: Get detailed info about an element: tag, attributes, text content, position, visibility, and an optional sub-screenshot cropped to the element. Useful for debugging selectors and understanding element state.

tools.name: browser_session_console
tools.description: Get console messages and errors captured from the page JavaScript since last call or session start. Buffers messages per session. Returns all accumulated messages and clears the buffer.

tools.name: browser_session_wait
tools.description: Enhanced waiting with multiple options: wait for CSS selector (with OR logic for multiple), text content in page, URL pattern matching, or custom condition via JS. More flexible than waitFor in goto.

selectors.description: CSS selectors - waits for ANY to appear (OR logic)

text.description: Text to wait for in page content

urlPattern.description: Regex pattern to match against current URL

condition.description: JS expression that must evaluate to truthy

tools.name: browser_session_metadata
tools.description: Get current page metadata: URL, title, and viewport dimensions. Useful to verify navigation succeeded. Requires sessionId from browser_session_create.
